targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="adguard_querylogs"} | json | IP=~"$client_ip" | Upstream=~"$upstream" | Cached="true" [$__interval])) / sum(count_over_time({job="adguard_querylogs"} | json | IP=~"$client_ip" | Upstream=~"$upstream" [$__interval])) * 100
{job="adguard_querylogs"} | json | IP=~"$client_ip" | Upstream=~"$upstream" | line_format "{{.IP}} → {{.QH}} ({{.QT}}) via {{.Upstream}} [{{if eq .Cached \"true\"}}⚡CACHED{{else}}🌐LIVE{{end}}]"

sum by (proto) (count_over_time({job="adguard_querylogs"} | json | IP=~"$client_ip" | Upstream=~"$upstream" | Upstream=~"(tls|quic|https)://.*" | regexp "(?P<proto>tls|quic|https)://.*" [$__interval]))
topk(25, sum by (QH) (count_over_time({job="adguard_querylogs"} | json | IP=~"$client_ip" | Upstream=~"$upstream" [$__interval])))
topk(10, sum by (IP) (count_over_time({job="adguard_querylogs"} | json | IP=~"$client_ip" | Upstream=~"$upstream" [$__interval])))
sum by (QT) (count_over_time({job="adguard_querylogs"} | json | IP=~"$client_ip" | Upstream=~"$upstream" | QT=~"A|AAAA" [$__interval]))
